hero.title: Baram
hero.subtitle: AI Compliance Settlement Layer
hero.description: Every prompt encrypted. Every execution recorded. Every payment guaranteed.
hero.target: For developers, enterprises, and regulators who need AI they can prove.

problem.headline: Today's AI is a black box.

privacy.title: No Privacy
privacy.description: Your prompts are sent in plaintext to servers you don't control.

payment.title: No Payment Guarantee
payment.description: If the AI fails or never responds, your payment is gone.

audit.title: No Audit Trail
audit.description: You can't prove who processed your request, with what model, or when.

privacy.baram: RSA-OAEP encrypted, decrypted only in TEE

payment.traditional: Pay upfront, no recourse on failure

tee.title: TEE Executor Layer
items: EC2 Host — HTTP Server + vsock Proxy
Nitro Enclave — RSA Decrypt + LLM Inference

hardware.title: Hardware Isolation
hardware.description: Prompts decrypted only inside AWS Nitro Enclaves. Private key never leaves TEE.

escrow.title: Escrow Settlement
escrow.description: NUSDC locked before execution. Auto-refund on timeout. No admin override.

stake.title: Skin in the Game
stake.description: Executors stake NASUN tokens. Fraud = 100% slashed. Timeout = 5% slashed.

compliance.title: Compliance Records
compliance.description: Every execution creates an immutable on-chain record: executor tier, model, TEE type, timestamp.

hardware.title: Trust Boundary
zones: Host (Untrusted) — HTTP server + vsock proxy, cannot decrypt
Enclave (Trusted) — RSA private key + LLM + NSM attestation
hardware.note: NSM attestation binds the enclave identity to PCR hashes, verified against on-chain baseline.

states.completed: Proof verified, NUSDC released to executor

stake.title: Executor Tier & Staking

tiers.open: Tier 0 — No stake, no reputation required

stake.philosophy: Tier is not a quality promise. It is a liability signal.

compliance.title: Execution Compliance Record (ECR)
compliance.note: Compliance records are created by default, not by request.

teeWorkers.title: TEE Workers
teeWorkers.description: AI runs inside Nitro Enclaves. Even the host cannot see your prompt.

stakeEarn.title: Stake & Earn
stakeEarn.description: Stake NASUN to qualify. Earn NUSDC per settled request. Staking determines eligibility, not selection frequency.

tierSystem.title: Tier System
tierSystem.description: Bronze / Silver / Gold — both stake and reputation must qualify. Tier is an eligibility filter, not a priority rank.

autoSelection.title: Fair Selection
autoSelection.description: Weighted random with a hard cap. New executors start at reputation 500, already competitive from day one.

tiers.title: Tier Thresholds
tiers.note: Tier is an eligibility filter, not a selection advantage. A Gold executor and a Bronze executor with the same reputation have the same selection weight.

selection.title: Selection Algorithm
items: Only Bronze+ executors enter the eligible pool — staking determines eligibility, not weight
Weight is capped at 1.0 — no executor can dominate through reputation alone
New executors start at reputation 500 (weight 0.8) — competitive from day one
Base weight 0.3 guarantees every eligible executor a fair chance
Users cannot choose executors — the system assigns via weighted random

slashing.title: Slashing Rules
slashing.dormancy: Executors with 0 completed jobs in 30 days lose 1 reputation per day.
